extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports 2 criminal proceedings by the Company, all of which are excluded, and Nil criminal proceedings against the Company, Directors, Promoters and Subsidiaries, giving 0 criminal cases against. It reports Nil statutory/regulatory actions in every against or by row, giving 0 regulatory actions; tax proceedings against the Company are 3, while the 8 tax proceedings against Directors and 8 against Promoters are personal matters and excluded, giving 3 tax proceedings against. For the aggregate amount against the Company and its Subsidiaries, I counted the Company-against amount of ₹2.56 million and the Nil Subsidiaries-against amount, excluding all by-party and promoter/director amounts, for ₹2.56 million = ₹0.256 crore. Contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹2.28 million as of December 31, 2023, equal to ₹0.228 crore; the source tables use ₹ million. The disclosed percentages concern Contracting Customers, JNK Global, products and geographic markets rather than company-wide top-five or top-ten customers as a percentage of revenue from operations for a full fiscal year, so both concentration fields are null.
